narrative: npm led with 79% of weekly downloads. Top package: @mcptoolshop/ai-loadout (175 this week). Top gainer: @mcptoolshop/polyglot-mcp (+217%; Δ117). Concentration: top 5 = 28.6%. Data is partial (degraded: npm, PyPI) (4 packages used cached previous data).

narrativeLines.label: Registry Lead
narrativeLines.text: npm led with 79% of 2,748 weekly downloads followed by PyPI (21%).

narrativeLines.label: Concentration
narrativeLines.text: Top 5 packages account for 28.6% of weekly downloads. Downloads are well-distributed across the portfolio.

narrativeLines.label: Data Health
narrativeLines.text: Data is partial (degraded: npm, PyPI) (4 packages used cached previous data).

recommendations.title: 2 packages losing momentum
recommendations.detail: @ai-rpg-engine/core, @ai-rpg-engine/character-creation show sustained decline. Consider: release updates, fix open issues, or update documentation.

recommendations.title: High portfolio concentration
recommendations.detail: Gini coefficient 0.81 indicates downloads are heavily concentrated in a few packages. Diversify promotion efforts across the portfolio.

recommendations.title: Heavy npm dependency
recommendations.detail: 79% of downloads come from npm. Consider cross-publishing to PyPI and NuGet to reduce single-registry risk.

recommendations.title: 1 package gaining traction
recommendations.detail: @mcptoolshop/ai-loadout show organic growth with download spikes. Capitalize with blog posts, social media, or conference talks.

recommendations.title: 2 packages predicted to grow
recommendations.detail: Statistical models predict >20% growth in the next 7 days for @mcptoolshop/ai-loadout, @mcptoolshop/ai-jam-sessions.

recommendations.title: 10 packages with repeated spikes
recommendations.detail: Multiple download spikes detected for @mcptoolshop/ai-loadout, @mcptoolshop/polyglot-mcp, @mcptoolshop/site-theme. Could indicate bot activity, viral posts, or dependency adoption.

actionableAdvice.title: 76 packages in critical health
actionableAdvice.detail: mcpt, tool-compass, sovereignty-game, backpropagate, polyglot-gpu scored below 20/100.
actionableAdvice.action: Review these packages for broken installs, outdated dependencies, or missing documentation. Consider archiving if no longer maintained.

actionableAdvice.title: 1 package surging
actionableAdvice.action: Capitalize now: write a blog post, tweet, or submit to newsletters. Post a "Thank you" issue or discussion.

actionableAdvice.title: Portfolio concentration risk
actionableAdvice.detail: Gini coefficient 0.81 — downloads are concentrated in a few packages.
actionableAdvice.action: Promote underperforming packages in README badges, blog posts, and release notes of popular packages.

actionableAdvice.title: 79% of traffic from npm
actionableAdvice.detail: Single-registry dependency increases blast radius if npm has outages or policy changes.
actionableAdvice.action: Cross-publish key packages to PyPI (via wrapper) or NuGet. Add install instructions for all registries in READMEs.
